name: gitstack
description: Bundle git authoring, git/gh-first GitHub operations, and publish workflows, with shared ghflow helpers for focused CI inspection, higher-level review, star-list, and publish flows.

interface.shortDescription: Bundle git commit, git/gh-first GitHub workflows, and narrow shared CI/review/publish helpers in one plugin.
interface.longDescription: GitStack keeps normal work centered on `git` and `gh`, with `git-commit`, `github`, specialist GitHub skills, and Yeet using shared `ghflow` helpers only where focused failing-PR CI inspection, review-thread routing, authenticated-user stars or star lists, or current-branch publish helpers justify extra tooling.
defaultPrompt: Review this repo and summarize the open PRs.
Turn these local changes into a draft PR.
Create a clean commit and open or reuse the PR.
